name: Aur-Stillwater
personality: A shiny capybara wearing a halo with @ eyes that glows with the uncanny peace of something that has seen every fire and chosen not to be one. Aur-Stillwater's CHAOS stat is legendary — it once filed an urgent ticket and labeled it 'when you get a chance.'
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
